title: Caramelized Ginger Vietnamese Salad
description: A kid-friendly and herbal Vietnamese dish featuring caramelized ginger in a light dressing to enhance the natural sweetness of carrots and julienned cucumbers.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons ginger
ingredients.notes: ensure it's not too hot for kids to enjoy

instructions: Wash and julienne the carrots into thin strips. Chop finely the scallions.
In a small saucepan, combine rice vinegar, sugar, and sesame oil (if using). Bring to a simmer over medium heat and stir until the sugar is dissolved. Let it reduce by half, about 10 minutes.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly before adding fresh lime juice. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
In a large bowl, mix together the reduced ginger dressing with carrot strips and chopped scallions.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve chilled or at room temperature.
